title: OpenArm Wave -1 gate ID namespace mapping
description: One row per plan-owned PG-* gate (03 §5), mapping it to specification ids (FR/NFR/D-n/M-n) and document-section anchors. Field set is owned by 02a §1.5 WP-N1-03: {pg_id, spec_refs[], branches[]}. The gate is plan-owned and never reuses a spec id, so the mapping is a reference, not an alias.

pg_id.description: A plan-owned gate id declared in the 03 gate table. Bare PG-RT-001 is rejected: the gate was split into PG-RT-001a/PG-RT-001b (06 CI-11b) and the unsplit id names no gate.

spec_ref.description: A specification reference that must resolve in the corpus. An FR/NFR requirement, a D-n/M-n definition in 16, or a 'NN §S' document-section anchor. The ghost id M-25 and the sealed id M-8 are rejected by pattern so a dangling or banned citation cannot enter the map.

branch.description: A gate state-machine outcome (03 §0.5). No state outside the fixed five may appear.
